text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "TABLET: Learning From Instructions For Tabular Data" is real and authored by Dylan Slack and Sameer Singh, confirmed by its dedicated arXiv page. The only error in the citation is the arXiv ID: the correct ID is 2304.13188, not 2305.00029 as cited; the title and authors are accurate.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.13188
